name: mx-finance-data
tagline: ClawHub (72★): 基于东方财富数据库，支持自然语言查询金融数据，覆盖A港美、基金、债券等多种资产，含实时行情、公司信息、估值、财务报表等，可用于投资研究、交易复盘、市场监控、行业分析、信用研究、财报审计、资产配置等场景，适配机构与个人多元需求。返回结果包含 xlsx
verdict: Security and functional quality are solid, but packaging is sloppy: no boundaries telling agents when NOT to use it, no version tracking anywhere, and its Python dependencies are pulled unpinned, so an upstream release can silently break it.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in description or body.
No version field, changelog heading, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
Well-known PyPI packages from the default registry, but installed unpinned (no version constraints) — matches the rubric's 'well-known packages unpinned = warning' case.
